title: callista commutata
intro: Callista commutata, also known as the wild indigo plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Callista commutata include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used to promote overall well-being.
